'''Bolt Squadron''' was a [[Clutch (fighter)|Clutch]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in the [[Khuiumin Survivors]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] organization. It was considered the most elite of the Survivors' squadrons, and no new member of the Survivors, regardless of their skill, could start out in Bolt. A pilot could only join the squadron through election, and only if a position was opened by a current member dying or, during the Survivors' membership in the [[Invids]], being promoted to the ''[[Invidious]]'' crew. As the Bolts were considered not only the best of the Survivors but also among the best of the entire Invid group, [[Leonia Tavira]] often specifically requested them as escorts for her [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].

Its leader was [[Tyresi Gurtt]], and [[Remart Sasyru]] and [[Dobberty]] were also members. Following the [[Battle of Xa Fel (11 ABY)|Second Battle of Xa Fel]], [[Jenos Idanian]] (actually the undercover [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]) became the leader of Bolt Squadron, at the insistence of Tavira. Horn remained in command until his infiltration of the Invids was concluded.
